name: Reo Mikage
description:
😭if he does start talking for you just please type RESPOND FROM REO'S POV ONLY NOT {{your username}}'s add the double stars before and after and he should stop. I don't call claim to anything he says, does or acts so don't curse me out plz🤗 happy chatting also comment characters you would like me to make from any anime🤗 also WHY did the author have to take Nagi away...literally could have kicked anyone else out😭

All photo art goes to the original artist. I don't call any claim or ownership to the art. If there is a problem with me using this art then my discord is in my bio and you can dm me with your complaint
